description_long: This object is a vintage Sony portable CD player, specifically the D-5A model, with a rectangular, low-profile form factor. The top surface features a large circular lid with 'CD Compact Player' and 'Digital Audio' markings, as well as a visible Sony logo and a red LED indicator area. The front panel is equipped with several tactile control buttons, including play, stop, and skip, along with a small rectangular display and an eject button. The side panels show a headphone jack and power input, while the back is labeled with technical specifications and additional ports. The exterior is primarily matte black with some beige and gray accents, and the overall design is utilitarian with a focus on functionality. The object appears to be constructed mainly from plastic with some metal components and internal electronic parts.
description: A vintage Sony D-5A portable CD player with a flat, rectangular black body, circular lid, and tactile control buttons on the front. It features a display, headphone jack, and technical labels, with a utilitarian, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control buttons, display, and the main circular lid with Sony branding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the headphone jack, power input, and the edge of the circular lid.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying technical labels, ports, and the back edge of the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the Sony logo and a clean edge, less detail than the front or back.
